shakshi: The vessel the player helped build finally left the Hieronymus Plateau
Sophia encountered — queen of the Assassin order, red and black with silver accent scales, ancient, Ko devotee, Drovitth's friend, knows all of humanity's foldings
Sophia breathed into the player before the throw — the preparation that made survival possible, the depths suddenly less oppressive
Sophia threw the player overboard — initiation, not violence
The player went under — the pull that began at the plateau edge in 0011 finally met
Faygoru intervened in the gap between consciousness and its absence — the steward of death chose not to take the player
Faygoru met in the most intimate way possible — in the moment the player blacked out, without announcement
Chazak met on the shore of Mercurie — Greater Siren, Transcendental Meditation teacher, Moshize devotee
Chazak taught Transcendental Meditation after landfall on Mercurie's shore
The Depth Meditation perk gated in 0011 finally lands — earned in the depths Sophia forced
The throw was initiation not harm — the player may or may not understand this immediately
First physical crossing into the Faewilds — journal exposure map begins from Chazak's beachfront outward
Sophia has been on Aeralune as long as humanity exists, knows the foldings and the arrival from Earth — the player will not learn this directly here
